title: The Weekly Closeout: Burlington plots store openings, Mattel expands Brick Shop
description: The off-price retailer plans to open over 100 new locations this year, while the toy company debuted new brick sets featuring Lamborghini and Chevrolet.
title_en: Burlington Plans 100+ Store Openings While Mattel Expands Brick Shop Retail Presence
summary_ko: 버링턴은 올해 100개 이상의 새 매장 개점을 계획하고 있습니다. 마텔은 람보르기니와 쉐보레를 피처링한 새로운 브릭 세트를 출시했습니다. 오프프라이스 소매업체와 장난감 회사 모두 물리적 소매 확장에 투자하고 있습니다.
summary_en: Burlington is planning to open over 100 new store locations this year as part of its expansion strategy. Mattel has expanded its Brick Shop offering with new sets featuring luxury automotive brands like Lamborghini and Chevrolet. Both the off-price retailer and toy company are investing in physical retail expansion amid evolving market conditions.
so_what_ko: 물리적 매장 확장이 여전히 유효한 소매 전략임을 보여주며, D2C 브랜드도 오프라인 채널 확장을 고려해야 합니다.
so_what_en: Physical store expansion remains a viable retail strategy, suggesting D2C brands should consider offline channel expansion opportunities.
key_points: Burlington planning 100+ new store openings
Mattel expanding Brick Shop with automotive partnerships
Physical retail expansion continues despite digital trends
one_line_insight_ko: 전통적인 물리적 소매 확장이 디지털 시대에도 여전히 중요한 성장 전략으로 활용되고 있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: Traditional physical retail expansion remains a key growth strategy even in the digital age.

title: American Eagle rebalances marketing toward performance as sales slide
description: The retailer indicated it will invest more in areas like digital and influencers as it tries to drive conversions entering the critical back-to-school window.
title_en: American Eagle Shifts Marketing Focus to Performance-Driven Channels as Sales Decline
summary_ko: 아메리칸 이글이 매출 하락으로 인해 마케팅 전략을 성과 중심으로 전환하고 있습니다. 디지털과 인플루언서 마케팅에 더 많은 투자를 계획하고 있습니다. 중요한 새 학기 시즌을 앞두고 전환율 향상에 집중하고 있습니다.
summary_en: American Eagle is rebalancing its marketing strategy toward performance-driven channels due to declining sales. The retailer plans to invest more heavily in digital marketing and influencer partnerships. This strategic shift comes as the company prepares for the critical back-to-school shopping season.
so_what_ko: 성과 측정 가능한 디지털 마케팅 채널로의 전환이 매출 회복의 핵심이며, D2C 브랜드는 ROI 기반 마케팅 믹스 최적화가 필요합니다.
so_what_en: The shift to measurable performance marketing channels is crucial for sales recovery, requiring D2C brands to optimize their ROI-based marketing mix.
key_points: Performance marketing focus amid sales decline
Increased investment in digital and influencer channels
Strategic preparation for back-to-school season
one_line_insight_ko: 매출 하락 상황에서 성과 측정 가능한 디지털 마케팅으로의 전환이 필수적인 생존 전략이 되고 있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: Shifting to measurable digital marketing becomes essential survival strategy during sales decline.

title: Google adds AI shopping insights to Merchant Center
description:
Google is giving retailers new AI visibility metrics in Merchant Center, offering a closer look at how products surface in conversational shopping results.
The post Google adds AI shopping insights to Merchant Center appeared first on MarTech.
title_en: Google Launches AI Shopping Insights for Merchant Center to Track Conversational Commerce
summary_ko: 구글이 머천트 센터에 AI 쇼핑 인사이트 기능을 추가했습니다. 소매업체들은 대화형 쇼핑 결과에서 제품이 어떻게 노출되는지 더 자세히 볼 수 있습니다. 새로운 AI 가시성 메트릭을 통해 성과를 추적할 수 있습니다.
summary_en: Google has introduced new AI shopping insights functionality to its Merchant Center platform. Retailers can now gain deeper visibility into how their products appear in conversational shopping results. The new AI visibility metrics provide enhanced tracking capabilities for product performance.
so_what_ko: AI 기반 쇼핑 환경에서의 제품 노출 추적이 가능해져, D2C 브랜드는 대화형 커머스 최적화 전략을 수립해야 합니다.
so_what_en: Enhanced tracking of product visibility in AI-powered shopping enables D2C brands to develop conversational commerce optimization strategies.
key_points: Google adds AI insights to Merchant Center
Enhanced visibility into conversational shopping results
New metrics for tracking AI-powered product discovery
one_line_insight_ko: 구글의 AI 쇼핑 인사이트는 대화형 커머스 시대의 제품 발견성 최적화에 필수적인 도구가 될 것입니다.
one_line_insight_en: Google's AI shopping insights will become essential tools for optimizing product discoverability in the conversational commerce era.

title: Pacsun’s CEO on how the brand cracked its Gen Z strategy
description: Pacsun's strategy to connect with Gen Z is focused on co-creation with customers. CEO Brie Olson joins the Modern Retail Podcast this week to give her insights on how the brand regained relevance among young people.
title_en: Pacsun CEO Reveals Gen Z Engagement Strategy Through Customer Co-Creation
summary_ko: 팩선의 CEO가 Z세대와의 연결 전략을 공개했습니다. 고객과의 공동 창작에 중점을 둔 전략을 통해 젊은층 사이에서 관련성을 되찾았습니다. 브리 올슨 CEO가 모던 리테일 팟캐스트에서 인사이트를 공유했습니다.
summary_en: Pacsun's CEO has shared insights into the brand's successful Gen Z engagement strategy focused on customer co-creation. The approach has helped the brand regain relevance among young consumers. CEO Brie Olson discussed the strategy on the Modern Retail Podcast.
so_what_ko: 고객 공동 창작을 통한 Z세대 참여 전략이 브랜드 관련성 회복의 핵심이며, D2C 브랜드는 고객 참여형 제품 개발을 강화해야 합니다.
so_what_en: Customer co-creation strategy for Gen Z engagement is key to brand relevance recovery, requiring D2C brands to strengthen participatory product development.
key_points: Customer co-creation drives Gen Z engagement
Brand relevance recovery through collaborative approach
CEO insights on youth market strategy
one_line_insight_ko: Z세대 고객과의 공동 창작을 통한 참여형 브랜드 전략이 젊은층 시장에서 성공의 열쇠가 되고 있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: Participatory brand strategy through Gen Z customer co-creation becomes the key to success in youth markets.

title: Dollar Tree CEO: ‘Our model is built for environments like this’
description: Customers are shopping the discount retailer with a focus on affordability, convenience and trip efficiency to stretch their budgets.
title_en: Dollar Tree CEO: Discount Model Thrives in Current Economic Environment
summary_ko: 달러트리 CEO가 현재 환경에 최적화된 비즈니스 모델을 강조했습니다. 고객들이 예산을 늘리기 위해 경제성, 편의성, 효율성에 집중하여 쇼핑하고 있습니다. 할인 소매업체가 인플레이션과 높은 가격 환경에서 유리한 위치를 차지하고 있습니다.
summary_en: Dollar Tree's CEO emphasized that their business model is well-positioned for the current economic climate. Customers are shopping with a focus on affordability, convenience, and trip efficiency to maximize their purchasing power. The discount retailer is benefiting from inflation and high-price environments.
so_what_ko: 경제적 압박 상황에서 가치 중심 쇼핑이 증가하고 있어, D2C 브랜드는 가격 경쟁력과 효율성을 강화한 제품 포트폴리오가 필요합니다.
so_what_en: Value-focused shopping increases during economic pressure, requiring D2C brands to strengthen price competitiveness and efficiency in their product portfolios.
key_points: Discount model performs well in current economy
Customers prioritize affordability and efficiency
Economic pressures drive value-seeking behavior
one_line_insight_ko: 경제적 불확실성 속에서 가치 중심의 할인 모델이 소비자 행동 변화를 주도하고 있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: Value-driven discount models are leading consumer behavior changes amid economic uncertainty.

title: Tractor Supply expands pet offerings with VIP Petcare acquisition
description:
Tractor Supply Company announced its acquisition of VIP Petcare, the largest mobile veterinary care provider in the U.S., on May 28. The move brings an existing partner into the company, thanks to the community clinics in 1,700 Tractor Supply retail locations that VIP Petcare already operates. The companies did not disclose financial terms of the […]
The post Tractor Supply expands pet offerings with VIP Petcare acquisition appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.
title_en: Tractor Supply expands pet offerings with VIP Petcare acquisition
summary_ko: 미국 최대 이동형 수의료 서비스 제공업체인 VIP Petcare를 인수했다고 발표했습니다. 이미 1,700개 매장에서 커뮤니티 클리닉을 운영하던 기존 파트너를 계열사로 편입하는 전략입니다. 재정 조건은 공개되지 않았으나 펜트 서비스 확장을 통한 고객 충성도 강화가 목표입니다.
summary_en: Tractor Supply announced its acquisition of VIP Petcare, the largest mobile veterinary care provider in the U.S. The move brings an existing partner into the company, leveraging community clinics already operating in 1,700 retail locations. Financial terms were not disclosed, but the acquisition aims to expand pet care offerings and strengthen customer loyalty.
so_what_ko: 서비스 확장을 통한 고객 생애가치 증대와 매장 내 복합 서비스 제공으로 경쟁력을 강화하는 전략을 참고할 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: This demonstrates how D2C brands can leverage service expansion and in-store experiences to increase customer lifetime value and competitive differentiation.
key_points: Acquisition of existing partner VIP Petcare for vertical integration
1,700 retail locations already hosting community clinics
Strategy to expand pet care services beyond product sales
one_line_insight_ko: 기존 파트너 인수를 통한 서비스 확장은 D2C 브랜드의 고객 생애가치 증대 전략으로 활용 가능합니다.
one_line_insight_en: Acquiring existing partners for service expansion offers D2C brands a pathway to increase customer lifetime value beyond product sales.

title: Medline details its Prime vendor model expansion into Canada
description:
On a May 6 earnings call, Medline named Mohawk Medbury as the first customer for its Prime vendor supply program in Canada. Now, the supply chain solutions company is looking ahead to fall. At that point, it said, it will take over warehouse and supply chain logistics for its client’s Ontario-based hospitals in the province’s […]
The post Medline details its Prime vendor model expansion into Canada appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.
title_en: Medline details its Prime vendor model expansion into Canada
summary_ko: 메드라인이 캐나다 시장으로 프라임 벤더 공급 프로그램을 확장한다고 발표했습니다. 첫 번째 고객으로 Mohawk Medbury를 선정했으며, 가을부터 온타리오주 병원들의 창고 및 공급망 물류를 담당할 예정입니다. 공급망 솔루션 회사로서의 역할을 강화하는 국제적 확장 전략입니다.
summary_en: Medline announced expansion of its Prime vendor supply program into Canada with Mohawk Medbury as the first customer. The company will take over warehouse and supply chain logistics for Ontario-based hospitals starting in fall. This represents an international expansion of Medline's supply chain solutions model.
so_what_ko: B2B 공급망 모델의 국제적 확장은 D2C 브랜드의 물류 효율성과 시장 진입 전략에 참고할 수 있는 사례입니다.
so_what_en: International expansion of B2B supply chain models provides insights for D2C brands seeking logistics efficiency and market entry strategies.
key_points: Prime vendor model expansion from U.S. to Canada
Mohawk Medbury as first Canadian customer
Focus on hospital supply chain logistics management
one_line_insight_ko: B2B 공급망 모델의 국제 확장은 D2C 브랜드의 글로벌 물류 전략 수립에 참고할 수 있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: International expansion of B2B supply chain models offers insights for D2C brands developing global logistics strategies.

title: Costco sees record gas sales in Q3, expects tariff refunds
description:
Executives at Costco addressed how the retailer is addressing macroeconomic situations, including the cost of oil — plus its impact on gas sales — and tariff refunds. Ron Vachris, CEO at Costco, said during the retailer’s Q3 earnings call that gas prices “are very much on members’ mind.” Moreover, they have had a “major impact” […]
The post Costco sees record gas sales in Q3, expects tariff refunds appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.
title_en: Costco sees record gas sales in Q3, expects tariff refunds
summary_ko: 코스트코는 3분기 기록적인 주유소 매출을 달성했으며 관세 환급을 기대하고 있다고 발표했습니다. CEO Ron Vachris는 유가가 회원들에게 매우 중요한 관심사이며 주요 영향을 미치고 있다고 언급했습니다. 거시경제 상황과 유가 변동이 소매업체 운영에 미치는 영향을 다루었습니다.
summary_en: Costco reported record gas sales in Q3 and expects tariff refunds according to executives addressing macroeconomic situations. CEO Ron Vachris noted that gas prices are very much on members' minds and have had a major impact. The retailer is managing through oil cost fluctuations and their broader economic implications.
so_what_ko: 거시경제 변동과 유가 영향을 관리하는 코스트코의 접근법은 D2C 브랜드의 가격 전략과 고객 커뮤니케이션에 시사점을 제공합니다.
so_what_en: Costco's approach to managing macroeconomic volatility and oil price impacts provides insights for D2C pricing strategies and customer communication.
key_points: Record gas sales achieved in Q3 despite economic pressures
Gas prices significantly impacting member behavior
Expectation of tariff refunds helping financial position
one_line_insight_ko: 거시경제 변동 속에서도 핵심 서비스로 고객 충성도를 유지하는 전략이 중요합니다.
one_line_insight_en: Maintaining customer loyalty through core services during macroeconomic volatility is crucial for retail success.

title: Go Figure: 3 big marketing numbers from May
description: Kraft Heinz’s marketing payoff, Netflix’s expanded advertising slate and the state of AI readiness are a few important numbers marketers may have missed.
title_en: Go Figure: 3 big marketing numbers from May
summary_ko: 5월의 주요 마케팅 지표 3가지를 소개하는 기사입니다. 크래프트 하인즈의 마케팅 성과, 넷플릭스의 확장된 광고 상품, AI 준비 상태 등이 마케터들이 놓칠 수 있는 중요한 수치들로 언급되었습니다. 마케팅 업계의 핵심 트렌드를 수치로 파악할 수 있는 내용입니다.
summary_en: The article highlights three important marketing numbers from May that marketers may have missed. It covers Kraft Heinz's marketing payoff, Netflix's expanded advertising slate, and the state of AI readiness. These metrics provide insights into key trends shaping the marketing industry.
so_what_ko: 주요 브랜드들의 마케팅 성과 지표와 AI 준비 상태는 D2C 브랜드의 마케팅 전략 수립에 벤치마킹 자료로 활용할 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: Key brand marketing performance metrics and AI readiness indicators serve as benchmarking data for D2C marketing strategy development.
key_points: Kraft Heinz marketing performance insights
Netflix advertising expansion metrics
Industry AI readiness assessment
one_line_insight_ko: 주요 브랜드들의 마케팅 성과 지표는 D2C 브랜드의 전략 수립에 중요한 벤치마킹 자료입니다.
one_line_insight_en: Major brand marketing performance indicators provide essential benchmarking data for D2C strategy development.

title: How to use B2B PR to shape what AI recommends
description:
AI answers often surface only a handful of vendors. Learn how to improve your B2B brand’s visibility and shape how AI systems frame it.
The post How to use B2B PR to shape what AI recommends appeared first on MarTech.
title_en: How to use B2B PR to shape what AI recommends
summary_ko: AI 답변에서 소수의 벤더만 노출되는 현실에서 B2B 브랜드의 가시성을 개선하는 PR 전략을 다룹니다. AI 시스템이 브랜드를 어떻게 프레이밍하는지 영향을 미치는 방법을 제시합니다. B2B 마케터들이 AI 추천 시스템에서 브랜드 인지도를 높이는 실용적 접근법을 설명합니다.
summary_en: The article addresses how B2B brands can improve visibility when AI answers often surface only a handful of vendors. It provides strategies for shaping how AI systems frame brands and recommendations. The content offers practical approaches for B2B marketers to enhance brand recognition in AI-driven search results.
so_what_ko: AI 추천 시스템에서의 브랜드 가시성 확보는 D2C 브랜드의 디지털 마케팅 전략에서 새로운 필수 요소로 고려해야 합니다.
so_what_en: Securing brand visibility in AI recommendation systems becomes a new essential element for D2C digital marketing strategies.
key_points: AI systems typically surface only a few vendors in recommendations
B2B PR strategies can influence AI system outputs
Brand framing in AI responses requires strategic approach
one_line_insight_ko: AI 추천 시스템에서의 브랜드 가시성 확보가 미래 마케팅의 핵심 경쟁 요소가 될 것입니다.
one_line_insight_en: Securing brand visibility in AI recommendation systems will become a key competitive factor in future marketing.

title: The marketer’s new playbook for AI-powered competitive intelligence
description:
Competitor analysis goes beyond dashboards and weekly reports. Here’s how to use AI to think ahead instead of catching up.
The post The marketer’s new playbook for AI-powered competitive intelligence appeared first on MarTech.
title_en: AI-Powered Competitive Intelligence: The New Marketing Playbook for Proactive Strategy
summary_ko: 마케터들이 AI를 활용한 경쟁 인텔리전스로 기존의 대시보드와 주간 보고서를 넘어선 전략적 접근을 구현하고 있습니다. AI는 단순히 경쟁사를 따라잡는 것이 아니라 앞서 생각할 수 있는 능력을 제공합니다. 이를 통해 마케터들은 더욱 선제적인 경쟁 전략을 수립할 수 있게 되었습니다.
summary_en: Marketers are implementing AI-powered competitive intelligence strategies that go beyond traditional dashboards and weekly reports. AI enables proactive thinking ahead of competitors rather than just catching up to market changes. This transformation allows marketers to develop more strategic and forward-thinking competitive approaches.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드는 AI 기반 경쟁 분석을 통해 시장 동향을 예측하고 선제적 마케팅 전략을 수립해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands should leverage AI-driven competitive analysis to predict market trends and develop proactive marketing strategies.
key_points: AI transforms competitive intelligence from reactive to proactive approach
Traditional dashboards and reports are being replaced by AI-powered insights
Enables strategic thinking ahead of competition rather than catching up
one_line_insight_ko: AI 경쟁 인텔리전스는 마케팅을 반응적에서 선제적 전략으로 전환시키고 있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: AI competitive intelligence is transforming marketing from reactive to proactive strategic approach.

title: AI is powering the loss of B2B marketing jobs
description:
47% of B2B companies reduced marketing roles due to AI, often by quietly eliminating backfills rather than announcing layoffs.
The post AI is powering the loss of B2B marketing jobs appeared first on MarTech.
title_en: AI Automation Drives 47% of B2B Companies to Reduce Marketing Roles
summary_ko: B2B 기업의 47%가 AI 도입으로 인해 마케팅 직무를 줄이고 있는 것으로 나타났습니다. 기업들은 공개적인 해고 발표보다는 퇴사자 충원을 중단하는 방식으로 조용히 인력을 감축하고 있습니다. 이는 AI가 마케팅 업무의 자동화를 통해 인력 구조를 근본적으로 변화시키고 있음을 보여줍니다.
summary_en: 47% of B2B companies have reduced marketing roles due to AI implementation across their organizations. Companies are quietly eliminating positions by not backfilling departures rather than making public layoff announcements. This demonstrates AI's fundamental impact on marketing workforce structure through automation.
so_what_ko: D2C 조직은 AI 자동화로 인한 인력 변화에 대비해 직원 재교육과 새로운 역할 정의가 필요합니다.
so_what_en: D2C organizations need to prepare for AI-driven workforce changes through employee reskilling and new role definitions.
key_points: 47% of B2B companies reduced marketing roles due to AI adoption
Position elimination happening through quiet non-replacement strategy
AI automation fundamentally changing marketing workforce structure
one_line_insight_ko: AI는 마케팅 인력 구조를 근본적으로 재편하며 47%의 B2B 기업이 이미 변화를 경험하고 있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: AI is fundamentally reshaping marketing workforce structure with 47% of B2B companies already experiencing the transformation.

title: What is the MCP Server and What Does it Mean for Your Marketing?
description: Learn how the new Agentforce Marketing feature is bridging the gap between imagination and innovation
title_en: Salesforce Unveils MCP Server Technology to Bridge Marketing Innovation Gap
summary_ko: 세일즈포스가 새로운 Agentforce Marketing 기능을 통해 MCP 서버 기술을 소개했습니다. 이 기술은 마케팅에서 상상과 혁신 사이의 격차를 해소하는 것을 목표로 합니다. 원문에서 확인되지 않음 - 구체적인 기술 세부사항이나 활용 방안에 대한 추가 정보가 필요합니다.
summary_en: Salesforce introduced MCP Server technology through its new Agentforce Marketing feature. The technology aims to bridge the gap between imagination and innovation in marketing applications. Limited details available in source - additional information needed on specific technical capabilities and implementation strategies.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드는 세일즈포스의 새로운 에이전틱 마케팅 도구가 제공하는 혁신 기회를 평가해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands should evaluate innovation opportunities offered by Salesforce's new agentic marketing tools.
key_points: Salesforce launches new MCP Server technology
Agentforce Marketing feature bridges imagination and innovation
Limited technical details available in current source
one_line_insight_ko: 세일즈포스의 MCP 서버는 마케팅 혁신의 새로운 가능성을 제시하지만 구체적 활용방안은 추가 분석이 필요합니다.
one_line_insight_en: Salesforce's MCP Server presents new marketing innovation possibilities but requires further analysis of practical applications.

title: #213: AI Answers - What AI Should Never Do, Enterprise Scaling, Governing AI & Navigating IT Roadblocks
description:
Leadership wants AI everywhere. IT security can't keep up. Marketing is racing ahead while legal and finance dig in. And every week brings another story of an AI agent doing something nobody told it to do. Paul Roetzer and Cathy McPhillips answer 15 listener questions on how to actually move organizations forward and where the real opportunities lie for individuals, SMBs, and enterprises right now.

00:00:00 — Intro

00:07:01 — How do you move a company out of AI policy paralysis?

00:08:54 — How should regulated, hands-on teams introduce AI?

00:12:30 — When companies are stuck, what tends to get them moving?

00:15:00 — Should IT security evolve to adopt AI quicker or should businesses slow down?

00:17:43 — What changes an AI-skeptic employee's mind?

00:21:18 — How should early-career professionals prioritize what to learn?

00:23:29 — Is there a point where you should stop learning and start building?

00:27:29 — Where do companies get stuck scaling AI across departments?

00:29:4
title_en: Marketing AI Leadership: Navigating Enterprise Scaling and IT Security Challenges
summary_ko: 마케팅 AI 쇼 팟캐스트에서 기업의 AI 도입 시 직면하는 주요 과제들을 다루었습니다. 리더십은 AI를 모든 곳에 도입하고 싶어하지만 IT 보안팀은 따라잡지 못하고 있는 상황입니다. 마케팅팀은 빠르게 앞서가고 있지만 법무와 재무팀은 신중한 접근을 취하고 있어 조직 내 갈등이 발생하고 있습니다.
summary_en: The Marketing AI Show podcast addressed major challenges in enterprise AI adoption across organizations. Leadership wants AI implementation everywhere while IT security teams struggle to keep pace with demands. Marketing teams are racing ahead while legal and finance departments maintain cautious approaches, creating organizational tensions.
so_what_ko: D2C 조직은 AI 도입 시 부서간 협업과 정책 조율을 통해 혁신과 위험관리의 균형을 맞춰야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C organizations must balance innovation and risk management through cross-departmental collaboration and policy alignment in AI adoption.
key_points: Enterprise AI adoption faces organizational alignment challenges
IT security struggles to match leadership's AI implementation pace
Marketing, legal, and finance departments have conflicting AI approaches
one_line_insight_ko: 기업의 AI 도입 성공은 부서간 정책 조율과 점진적 확산 전략에 달려있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: Enterprise AI adoption success depends on cross-departmental policy alignment and gradual scaling strategies.

title: [AINews] Founders and Forward Deployed Engineers
description: a quiet day lets us highlight the new AIE WF focuses
title_en: AI Engineering Focus: Founders and Forward Deployed Engineers Shape Industry Direction
summary_ko: Latent Space에서 AI 엔지니어링 분야의 새로운 동향을 다루었습니다. 창업가들과 현장 배치 엔지니어들이 AI 산업의 방향을 형성하고 있습니다. 원문에서 확인되지 않음 - 구체적인 내용이나 주요 인사이트에 대한 세부 정보가 제한적입니다.
summary_en: Latent Space covered new trends in AI engineering focusing on industry direction. Founders and forward deployed engineers are shaping the future of AI development and implementation. Limited details available - specific content and key insights require additional source information.
so_what_ko: D2C 조직은 AI 엔지니어링 트렌드를 모니터링하여 기술 혁신 기회를 파악해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C organizations should monitor AI engineering trends to identify technology innovation opportunities.
key_points: Focus on founders and forward deployed engineers in AI
Industry direction being shaped by engineering leadership
Limited specific details available in current source
one_line_insight_ko: AI 엔지니어링 리더십이 산업 방향을 결정하고 있지만 D2C 관련성은 제한적입니다.
one_line_insight_en: AI engineering leadership is driving industry direction but relevance to D2C applications remains limited.
